notes: Patterns ported from the original Cashiro KeralaGraminBankParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/KeralaGraminBankParser.kt) Two known formats, both UPI: - debit: "Your a/c no. XXXX12345 is debited for Rs.160.00 on ... and credited to a/c no. XXXXX00019 (UPI Ref no 170632692557)" -> merchant "UPI Transfer" - credit: "Dear Customer, Account XXXX123 is credited with INR 3000 on ... from 7025784485@upi. UPI Ref. no. 529807237409" -> merchant is the VPA local part, or "UPI Payment" when the local part is a bare phone number.

fixtures.name: upi debit transfer
fixtures.body: Your a/c no. XXXX12345 is debited for Rs.160.00 on 28/7/25 05:06 PM and credited to a/c no. XXXXX00019 (UPI Ref no 170632692557)-Kerala Gramin Bank

fixtures.name: upi credit from phone number
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, Account XXXX123 is credited with INR 3000 on 20-10-2025 08:15:26 from 7025784485@upi. UPI Ref. no. 529807237409-Kerala Gramin Bank

fixtures.name: upi credit from named vpa
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, Account XXXX5678 is credited with INR 500 on 15-10-2025 10:30:00 from merchant@paytm. UPI Ref. no. 123456789012-Kerala Gramin Bank

fixtures.name: larger upi debit with comma amount
fixtures.body: Your a/c no. XXXX9876 is debited for Rs.1,250.50 on 01/8/25 03:15 PM and credited to a/c no. XXXXX11111 (UPI Ref no 987654321098)-Kerala Gramin Bank

fixtures.name: otp message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, your OTP for Kerala Gramin Bank net banking login is 482913. Do not share this OTP or password with anyone.-Kerala Gramin Bank
